name: super-developer-marketplace
description: A marketplace for portable coding-assistant workflow skills, currently packaged for Claude Code.

plugins.name: super-developer
plugins.description: Orchestrates the full development lifecycle with 11 skills — divergent ideation, evidence-first planning and bug fixing, requirements-spec-driven planning, empirical feature spikes, parallel implementation with git worktree isolation, multi-agent adversarial code review, codebase documentation, and gated release publishing.
